issues.detail: The instructions lack coverage of error handling and edge cases.
Downloaded docker-compose.yml and .env files lack checksum verification.

scenarios.name: deploy-appwrite-database-collection
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers the Docker Compose deployment, collection creation with correct permissions, and attempts an index, though the index code is incomplete; Response B lacks Docker Compose, collection creation, and index setup.

scenarios.name: realtime-subscribe-messages
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric with Appwrite realtime subscription and event handling, while Response B uses Firebase and does not meet the Appwrite requirement.
